_meta.description: English channel calibration E2E test: why/what query scenarios with causal decision detection and definition ranking

memories.text: My name is John Chen, a software engineer who prefers building backend services with Rust and likes redb for embedded storage.
I've contributed to several Rust open-source projects, including CLI tools and database bindings.
Because RocksDB compilation was too slow, I decided to use redb instead for embedded storage.
I am John Chen, an open-source project contributor
HippMem is a native associative memory engine implemented in Rust
